ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2013-14) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "regular_season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the regular season */,
  "regular_season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the regular season */,
  "playoffs_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoffs_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "league_type" TEXT /* Type of league (e.g., professional, collegiate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team is part of */,
  "team_city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "team_state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "team_arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., point guard, power forward) */,
  "player_height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "player_weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_roster" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "roster_season" INTEGER /* Season the player is part of the team's roster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_roster_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_roster_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Number of points scored */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_performance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started */,
  "double_doubles" INTEGER /* Number of double-doubles */,
  "triple_doubles" INTEGER /* Number of triple-doubles */,
  "forty_point_games" INTEGER /* Number of 40-point games */,
  "twenty_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of 20-rebound games */,
  "twenty_assists" INTEGER /* Number of 20-assist games */,
  "technical_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of technical fouls */,
  "hardwood_battles" REAL /* Number of hardwood battles */,
  "ast_to_to_ratio" REAL /* Assist-to-turnover ratio */,
  "stl_to_to_ratio" REAL /* Steal-to-turnover ratio */,
  "ft_to_fga_ratio" REAL /* Free throw-to-field goal attempt ratio */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Winning percentage */,
  "offensive_win_shares" REAL /* Offensive win shares */,
  "defensive_win_shares" REAL /* Defensive win shares */,
  "total_win_shares" REAL /* Total win shares */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, manager, coach, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the performance record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES team_performance ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, Rookie of the Year) */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., individual, team) */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
